lastReleaseMessage: correct the inverted print-path hazard in the handler to match the shipped print-stage render; rewrite the v1.0.0/v1.0.1 changelog stubs as milestone notes; reverify the print render on the live build

barRaise.topFinding: All 2026-06-24 findings are resolved. The inverted MEDIUM is fixed: the CLAUDE.md print hazard now matches the shipped code, describing the parallel #print-stage render (body > * display:none plus #print-stage display:flex in @media print) instead of the retired visibility-toggle pattern. Both LOWs are closed too: the v1.0.0/v1.0.1 CHANGELOG stubs are rewritten as human milestone notes, and the print path was reverified on the live v1.0.1 build (print-stage rebuilds with parchment, symbol, and illustration art all loading, display:none on screen as designed), resetting the ~31-day unverified gap. The stale-working-tree queue item was a FUSE stale-read false positive: all five named files are committed and match HEAD, no orphaned edits. Project is healthy and feature-complete at v1.0.
